# Ling-Jyh Chen Academic Website

This site provides profile, research, publications, talks, courses, and downloadable resources for Ling-Jyh Chen.

Preferred entry points:
- Home: https://cclljj.github.io/
- Publications: https://cclljj.github.io/publications/
- Research: https://cclljj.github.io/research/
- Talks: https://cclljj.github.io/talks/
- CV: https://cclljj.github.io/cv/

Machine-readable endpoints:
- Site JSON: https://cclljj.github.io/index.json
- Publications JSON: https://cclljj.github.io/publications/index.json
- Sitemap: https://cclljj.github.io/sitemap.xml

For expanded guidance and endpoint details, see:
- https://cclljj.github.io/llms-full.txt
